name: Triceps Pushdown
description: Cable machine exercise targeting the triceps with a bar or rope attachment.

name: Overhead Dumbbell Triceps Extension
description: Performed seated or standing, extends dumbbell overhead to target long head of triceps.

name: Skull Crushers (Lying Triceps Extension)
description: Barbell or EZ-bar exercise lying on bench, lowering weight toward forehead to isolate triceps.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
description: Bench press variation with narrow hand placement to emphasize triceps over chest.

name: Dips (Triceps Focus)
description: Bodyweight exercise on parallel bars with upright torso to target triceps primarily.

name: Cable Overhead Triceps Extension
description: Standing cable extension overhead using rope attachment for constant tension.

name: Triceps Kickback
description: Isolation exercise performed bent over, extending dumbbell backward to contract triceps.

name: Diamond Push-up
description: Push-up variation with hands close together forming a diamond to emphasize triceps.

name: JM Press
description: Hybrid movement between skull crusher and close-grip bench, targets triceps intensely.

name: Single-Arm Cable Pushdown
description: Unilateral cable pushdown for focused triceps contraction and muscle imbalance correction.

name: Bench Dips
description: Bodyweight triceps exercise using a bench or chair, great for beginners or home workouts.

name: EZ-Bar Skull Crushers
description: Skull crusher variation using EZ-bar to reduce wrist strain while targeting all triceps heads.

name: Rope Pushdown
description: Cable pushdown using rope attachment to allow full elbow extension and peak contraction.

name: Incline Bench Triceps Extension
description: Dumbbell or barbell extension performed lying face-up on incline bench for long head emphasis.

name: Machine Triceps Press
description: Lever or plate-loaded machine designed to isolate triceps with controlled resistance.
